state.next-action:
Phase 28 task 28-01 complete: /project-market page shipped (commit 292c621). Build passes.
=== DONE THIS SESSION === - /project-market route with all EVAL_PROJECTS, featured badges, per-project round filtering - PlayableTeaser on home page (latest ETD round only) - Nav, hero CTA, footer updated to point to /project-market
=== NEXT === 1. GAD CLI build/release pipeline (Windows) — phase 29 2. Merge /gad page: framework + catalog + hypothesis matrix 3. Move rubric to project detail (gad-131) 4. Site reusability review (gad-134) 5. Run evals (round 5, tech-stacks, reverse-engineer)
